creator: Tim Fernholz
title: (No AI) The ‘Father of the Internet’ is finally retiring
dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
content: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.
contentSnippet: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.

creator: Tim Fernholz
title: (No AI) Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
content: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.
contentSnippet: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.

title: (No AI) Meet the lawyer who beat Elon Musk — twice
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![A photograph of Bill Savitt, in black and white, against a pink background with orange gavels](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/268607_An_interview_with_William_Savitt_Elon_Musks_courtroom_nemesis_CVirginia.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

“After college, my plan was to come to New York and get a record deal.” | Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images

Watching Elon Musk fulminate at Bill Savitt during _Musk v. Altman_ - the case in which [Musk sued Sam Altman and OpenAI](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/917755/musk-altman-openai-xai-gossip) instead of seeing a therapist about [his AI failures](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/931006/musk-v-altman-closing-arguments-analysis) - was a bit like watching a toddler have a temper tantrum at his nursery school teacher. Savitt's questions were "designed to trick me," Musk said. He also told Savitt at one point, "You mostly do unfair questions."

Savitt, who has the approximate demeanor of a handsome Droopy Dog, [gently told Musk](https://www.theverge.com/tech/921022/elon-musk-cross-openai-altman), "I am trying to put the questions as fairly as I can. I am doing my best."

I've seen a number of styles of cross-examination. Savitt's was mild-mannered and soft-spoken; his q …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/column/959270/elon-musk-open-ai-bill-savitt-twitter)

title: (No AI) Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music, but isn’t banning it outright
author: Andrew Liszewski
content:
![Colorful graphic of Tidal logo](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25319678/STK301_Tidal_01.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Tidal [shared its new policies regarding AI-generated music today](https://tidal.com/ai-policy) and how the platform plans to "protect artists" and "inform listeners." Instead of banning it outright, [starting on July 15th](https://x.com/TIDAL/status/2071593228952822146) Tidal will label tracks it has identified as being 100 percent AI-generated with an icon. But starting today those tracks will no longer be monetizable. "Tidal's priority is ensuring royalties go to original works directly produced, written, and performed by people. We will therefore not knowingly attribute royalties to music we identify as wholly AI-generated," the company's announcement reads.

The platform didn't specify what tools it's using to iden …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/959211/tidal-ai-music-policy-demonetizingdetect-label)

We will therefore not knowingly attribute royalties to music we identify as wholly AI-generated," the company's announcement reads.

title: (No AI) How ChatGPT adoption has expanded

creator: Hugo Lowell
title: (No AI) The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models
dc:creator: Hugo Lowell
content: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.
contentSnippet: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.

creator: Katie Drummond
title: (No AI) Bernie Sanders Saw This Coming
dc:creator: Katie Drummond
content: For decades, the senator has argued that concentrated wealth threatened American democracy. Now he’s betting that frustration with Big Tech, billionaires, and unchecked AI is reaching a tipping point.
contentSnippet: For decades, the senator has argued that concentrated wealth threatened American democracy. Now he’s betting that frustration with Big Tech, billionaires, and unchecked AI is reaching a tipping point.
